_comment: HyPar — reads solver.inp/boundary.inp/physics.inp from CWD with NO CLI overrides. Need to symlink the example dir contents into cwd. The Examples/1D/FPDoubleWell/ files become cwd via symlink_input_data on 'Examples'. Adjust workload by editing solver.inp in the source (not done here — accepts the existing values).
_status: 1D/FPDoubleWell example only supports 1 MPI rank (solver.inp declares iproc=1). num_procs=1 here, unlike most apps which use 4. To use 4 ranks, switch to a HyPar example that declares iproc=4 (or matching factorization).
